articles.author: Charlotte Graham-McLay
articles.title: International Energy Agency head says global economy faces ‘major, major threat’ because of Iran war - AP News
articles.description: The head of the International Energy Agency says the global economy faces a “major, major threat” because of the Iran war. Fatih Birol told Australia’s National Press Club in Canberra on Monday that the crisis in the Middle East has had a worse impact on oil …
articles.content:
WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) The head of the International Energy Agency said Monday that the global economy faces a major, major threat because of the Iran war.
